# LEZAC explosion playback oracle fixture v1
# Synthetic parser fixture: high queue counters can select sparse dumped records.
capture=explosion_playback
source=dosbox-debug
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
command=dosbox-debug -c "mount c /tmp/lezac-dosbox-explosion" -c "c:" -c "DEBUG LEZAC.EXE"

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C
selected_effect_base=C22E

break ghidra=1000:75F1 runtime=1A2B:75F1 label=bomb_expire_dispatch_call
break ghidra=1000:414A runtime=1A2B:414A label=explosion_dispatcher
break ghidra=1000:370E runtime=1A2B:370E label=tile_damage_queue
break ghidra=1000:3A7E runtime=1A2B:3A7E label=damage_forward_lookup
break ghidra=1000:3B18 runtime=1A2B:3B18 label=damage_reverse_lookup
break ghidra=1000:3BB2 runtime=1A2B:3BB2 label=collapse_forward_pass
break ghidra=1000:3D46 runtime=1A2B:3D46 label=collapse_reverse_pass

dump DS:2070
2B3C:2070  b4 9d 0f 00 0f 00 08 00 00 00 20 66 9e 20 c8 00
2B3C:2080  01 00 02 00 2e 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 03 00 00

dump DS:2090
2B3C:2920  00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 40 05 04 c0 27
2B3C:2930  00 27 00 01 67 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00

dump DS:6610
2B3C:6620  06 0a 08 0a 09 80 00 f1 00 f1 0f 00 00 01 04 00

dump DS:C1E0
2B3C:C1E0  00 00 a9 3e 00 00 cf 2a 3c 05 28 00 40 01 a0 00

dump DS:C21E
2B3C:C22E  bf 00 b0 00 10 10 7d 3f c4 00 b5 00 10 10 7d 40
